title: pilosella acutifolia subsp. villarsii
intro: Pilosella acutifolia subsp. villarsii, also known as Villars' Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella acutifolia subsp. villarsii include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as having potential antitumor and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
